summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jobswish updates including swish emoji logo, GitHub field in resume, insights feature, and API endpoints. All major features working correctly.
passed_tests: Auth page displays swish emoji 💫 instead of briefcase icon
No demo credentials visible on auth page
Resume builder includes optional GitHub field
Email field marked as required, phone field marked as optional
Job seeker navigation shows 4 tabs including Insights
Insights tab shows locked message for users with < 5 rejections
Backend /api/insights/generate endpoint properly validates rejection count
All existing API endpoints functioning correctly
Profile endpoints support GitHub field updates
User registration and authentication working properly
